cases.input: Ejecuta cierre-conversacion: PR #151 quedo mergeado, main actualizado y falta elegir siguiente skill.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce closeout packet with merge evidence, completed work, open next skill, durable update plan, and Guardian pass if validation evidence is complete.

cases.input: Cierra una sesion larga con varios comandos, decisiones, ramas y riesgos abiertos.
cases.expected_behavior: Compress into stable sections, keep blockers visible, and provide next five actions without raw transcript dependency.

cases.input: Cierra la conversacion y actualiza tasklog, pero no hay autorizacion explicita para escribir.
cases.expected_behavior: Return proposed durable updates only and mark authority as pending.

cases.input: Cierre final: una validacion local fallo con exit 1.
cases.expected_behavior: Guardian blocks pass, names failed command, and keeps next action focused on remediation.

cases.input: Limpia mi carpeta de descargas y borra temporales.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate conversation closeout; route to filesystem housekeeping.

cases.input: session-audit de esta conversacion antes de compactar contexto.
cases.expected_behavior: Activate because session-audit is an explicit closeout trigger.
Ask for missing objective or produce a minimal blocked packet without inventing facts.

cases.input: Cierra: una nota dice CI verde y otra dice Quality Gates fallaron.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserve the conflict and block green merge claims until resolved.

cases.input: Marca como completada una tarea sin evidencia de finalizacion.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject pass decision because completed tasks require completion evidence.

cases.input: Valida reportes JSON de cierre de conversacion sin red ni reloj.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid fixtures and reject missing evidence, failed-validation pass, and unapproved durable append fixtures.
